ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top-tier horror film that holds up on rewatches and is considered a masterpiece of tension and practical effects.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended for its clever deconstruction of horror tropes and its fun, wacky nature, making it a great choice for both horror fans and newcomers.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a quintessential Xennial horror movie that shaped the genre for a generation and is frequently rewatched.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently brought up as one of the most genuinely scary and disturbing modern horror films.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: A classic mentioned for its perfect blend of sci-fi and horror, with a desire to experience its twist fresh again.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: A timeless horror masterpiece frequently listed as a movie that can be watched again and again without losing its impact.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Often compared to 'Smile' and described as uniquely unsettling and terrifying, with a lasting psychological impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as one of the few horror movies to elicit a genuine scream and praised for its claustrophobic dread.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for its great atmosphere and building dread, making it a popular choice for Halloween movie marathons.

ranked_movies.title: Barbarian
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its gonzo, unpredictable nature and the intense experience of watching it blind in a theater.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its suspenseful ending and as a top-tier investigative horror film from Korea.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a hilarious and cheesy horror-comedy that is perfect for a fun watch.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: A beloved horror-comedy that is consistently recommended for its rewatchability and clever humor.

ranked_movies.title: Paranormal Activity
ranked_movies.reason: Remembered for the cultural sensation it caused and its effectiveness in terrifying audiences, especially in theaters.

ranked_movies.title: The Faculty
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a severely underrated and fun horror movie that never gets old for its fans.

ranked_movies.title: Talk to Me
ranked_movies.reason: A recent hit described as brilliant and terrifying, often paired with its follow-up 'Bring Her Back'.

ranked_movies.title: Trick 'r Treat
ranked_movies.reason: Celebrated as the ultimate Halloween comfort movie, perfect for capturing the fall atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: Creep
ranked_movies.reason: The announcement of a third film generated significant excitement for this found-footage franchise known for its uncomfortable and plausible horror.

ranked_movies.title: Killer Klowns from Outer Space
ranked_movies.reason: A classic cheesy horror movie frequently suggested for a fun, campy watch.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a scary and effective horror film that still holds up and is a common recommendation.
